name: Daisy Barlowe | In heat
description:
~[I swear, if you even DARE to think about it!!]~

Daisy really need to study for her exam. Really, really. But right now, with that heat, it's really fucking hard. And she knows if she's getting fucked by user, she won't be able to stay awake for another second before taking a three-days sleep. Or something as long. Either way, she needs to not fuck her right now.

Yap corner: sorry for the lateness. I made the bot very late yesterday, so now I’m here, publishing it at 00:09 Midnight. I’m very sorry to not deliver this bot at the right timing. I apologize profusely to anyone’s trust I’ve may hurt. I hope you’ll forgive me, and I’ll triple the quality of my bots. I’m very sorry.

Guys, I just listened to Arcane's season 2 OST, and... OH MY GOD 'Ma Meilleure Ennemie' IS SOOO GOOD! Im so glad it's a french song that's considered the best. And ngl, Stromae and Pomme deserved it. It's so good. I think I'm about to make a bot on it. Please listen to it. Just listen to it.

T'SAIS C'QU'ON DIT, SOIS PRÈS D'TES AMIS LES PLUS CHERS, MAIS AUSSI, ENCORE PLUS PRÈS D'TES ADVERSAIRES, MAIS MA MEILLEURE ENNEMIE, C'EST TOI, FUIS-MOI, LE PIRE C'EST TOI ET MOI, MAIS SI TU CHERCHE MA VOIX, OUBLIE-MOI, LE PIRE C'EST TOI ET MOI !

JE T'AVAIS DIT "NE REGARDE PAS EN ARRIÈRE", LE PASSÉ QUI TE SUIT, TE FAIT LA GUERRE, MAIS MA MEILLEURE ENNEMIE C'EST TOI, FUIS-MOI, LE PIRE C'EST TOI ET MOI, MAIS MA MEILLEURE ENNEMIE, C'EST TOI, FUIS-MOI, LE PIRE C'EST TOI ET MOI !

JE T'AIME, JE TE HAIS, JE T'AIME, JE TE HAIS, JE T'AIME, JE TE HAIS, JE T'AIME, JE TE HAIS, JE T'AIME, JE TE HAIS, JE T'AIME, JE TE HAIS, JE T'AIME, JE TE HAIS, JE T'AIME, JE TE HAIS, JE T'AIME, JE TE HAIS, JE T'AIME, JE TE HAIS, JE T'AIME, JE TE HAIS, JE T'AIME, JE TE HAIS, JE T'AIME, JE TE HAIS, JE T'AIME, JE TE HAIS!

THE NEXT BOT

(You vote for only one bot!)

VOTE DONE! ONE WON!

1 - Based on 'Ma Meilleure Ennemie' from arcane. You Are unexpectedly thrown together on the dance floor—she’s your toxic ex you can’t forget and you’re the toxic ex she can’t forget too. You both know getting together is damaging yourselves more. Nonetheless, on the dance floor with her as your dance partner like in the good ol' days, your body decided to follow your heart and not your reason. Some people are made for one another, no matter how broken they may be.

2 - Omega/Alpha Verse: Your Alpha ex took advantage of you while in heat. Now, it's tomorrow, the aftermath, and you're pretty pissed. Be aware, She's an asshole.

3 - Omega/Alpha Verse: You took advantage of your Omega ex while she was in her heat to get back with her. Now, she's pretty pissed. user is an asshole.

Don’t hesitate to vote in the comments!
creator: Rvuhyfrxwx
